name: Dear Abby's Easy Sweet Potato or Yam Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups cooked yams or sweet potatoes; puree
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 350°F. In a food processor, combine all ingredients except the crust. Process until well blended. Pour into the unbaked pie shell. Bake for 50 to 55 minutes or until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean and the pie is golden-brown.
